title: agropyron trachycaulum f. caninoides
intro: Agropyron trachycaulum f. caninoides, also known as a subspecies of the slender wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agropyron trachycaulum f. caninoides include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
